section_name: Motorcycle and Moped Footrests and Handholds Required
text:
(a) A motorcycle or moped that is designed to carry more than one person must be equipped with footrests and handholds for use by the passenger.

(b) This section does not apply to an autocycle as defined by Section 501.008 (Title for Autocycle) or a motorcycle as defined by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.617 — Motorcycle and Moped Footrests and Handholds Required

(a) A motorcycle or moped that is designed to carry more than one person must be equipped with footrests and handholds for use by the passenger.

(b) This section does not apply to an autocycle as defined by Section 501.008 (Title for Autocycle) or a motorcycle as defined by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a).

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 882 (H.B.3171), Sec. 2.14, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A motorcycle or moped that is designed to carry more than one person must be equipped with footrests and handholds for use by the passenger.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: This section does not apply to an autocycle as defined by Section 501.008 (Title for Autocycle) or a motorcycle as defined by Section 521.001 (Definitions) (a)(6-a).
